description: A Differential Expression workflow for RNA-Seq data based on the DESeq2 package from Bioconductor
author: David Eby;Broad Institute
plan:
## DESeq2 GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
DESeq2 is a GenePattern module that A Differential Expression workflow for RNA-Seq data based on the DESeq2 package from Bioconductor

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 8 parameters:
- Required: input.file, cls.file, output.file.base, qc.plot.format, fdr.threshold, top.N.count, random.seed
- Optional: confounding.variable.cls.file

### 3. Command Line
```
Rscript --no-save --quiet --slave --no-restore <libdir>run_gp_deseq2.R <libdir> --input.file\=<input.file> --cls.file\=<cls.file> <confounding.variable.cls.file> --output.file.base\=<output.file.base> --qc.plot.format\=<qc.plot.format> --fdrThreshold\=<fdr.threshold> --topNCount\=<top.N.count> --randomSeed\=<random.seed>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/deseq2\:v3

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: input.file
parameters.description: A GCT file containing raw RNA-Seq counts, such as is produced by MergeHTSeqCounts

parameters.name: cls.file
parameters.description: A categorical CLS file specifying the phenotype classes for the samples in the GCT file.  This should contain exactly two classes with the control specified first.

parameters.name: confounding.variable.cls.file
parameters.description: A categorical CLS file specifying an additional confounding variable, mapped to the input file samples.  Use this for a two-factor comparison.

parameters.name: output.file.base
parameters.description: The base name of the output file(s). File extensions will be added automatically.

parameters.name: qc.plot.format
parameters.description: Choose a file format for the QC plots (or skip them completely)

parameters.name: fdr.threshold
parameters.description: FDR threshold to use in filtering before creating the reports of top up-regulated and down-regulated genes

parameters.name: top.N.count
parameters.description: Max gene count to use when creating the reports of top up-regulated and down-regulated genes
